mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( receiver_user_id, actor_user_id, notification_type, target_type, target_id, message, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( #{receiverUserId}, #{actorUserId}, #{notificationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{message}, 'N', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT n.notification_id, n.receiver_user_id, n.actor_user_id, u.display_name AS actor_name, n.notification_type, n.target_type, n.target_id, n.message, n.is_read, n.read_at, n.created_at FROM NOTIFICATION n JOIN USER u ON n.actor_user_id = u.user_id WHERE n.receiver_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.notification_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE receiver_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 'N'

SELECT n.notification_id, n.receiver_user_id, n.actor_user_id, u.display_name AS actor_name, n.notification_type, n.target_type, n.target_id, n.message, n.is_read, n.read_at, n.created_at FROM NOTIFICATION n JOIN USER u ON n.actor_user_id = u.user_id WHERE n.notification_id = #{notificationId} AND n.receiver_user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id FROM USER WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND user_id != #{excludeUserId}
SELECT display_name FROM USER WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id FROM MEDIA_ITEMS WHERE media_id = #{mediaId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT title FROM MEDIA_ITEMS WHERE media_id = #{mediaId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id FROM COMMENT WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT content FROM COMMENT WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT media_id FROM COMMENT WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id FROM USER WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND role = 'ADMIN' AND user_id != #{excludeUserId}
SELECT user_id FROM REQUEST_POST WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT request_id FROM REQUEST_COMMENT WHERE request_comment_id = #{requestCommentId} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
